headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Halliburton (HAL) After Its 1 Year 104% Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Halliburton stock at around US$38.85 still offers value after a strong run, the key is to look closely at what the current price implies versus its fundamentals. The stock is up 31.2% year to date and 103.8% over the past year, even though it has slipped about 6.3% over the past week and 6.7% over the past month. Recent headlines around Halliburton have focused on its position in the energy services space and how that links to investor sentiment on oilfield...
